name: Inactive part remains in the database and can be viewed
steps:
Given a part 'Obsolete Chip XYZ' is marked as Inactive
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Obsolete Chip XYZ' via its direct URL
Then the part detail page loads and displays 'Obsolete Chip XYZ' with an Inactive status indicator

name: Mark a part as Inactive removes it from active workflows
steps:
Given an active part 'Obsolete Chip XYZ' exists
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Obsolete Chip XYZ'
When the user edits the part and unchecks the 'Active' checkbox
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the part detail page for 'Obsolete Chip XYZ' shows the part as Inactive and the part is excluded from active part searches and workflows
